scope: FOSS POS on Linux-connected POS hardware with server-backed reporting.
candidatePatterns: Linux POS terminal running a browser or native POS client
Server-side POS database or ERP integration
Receipt printer, cash drawer, barcode scanner, and card terminal treated as hardware contracts
acceptanceBeforeImplementation: Choose POS application and licensing model
Identify hardware interfaces and driver support
Decide whether payment processing is in scope
Define offline mode and sync behavior
Define security boundary for till users versus platform operators
